title: Jar Opener Gripper Pads (Pack of 4) - Round Non Slip Grippers for Jars, Lids & Bottles - Multipurpose Silicone Jar Lid Openers for Opening Jars for Weak Arthritic Hands & Seniors,
description:
A must-have tool: Our round jar gripper is a versatile household and kitchen tool that can be used for multiple purposes. It provides a secure grip for opening bottles, jars, and airtight containers. Additionally, it can also be used as a coaster to protect your surfaces from water rings or heat damage.
Versatile: The jar opener has a wide range of applications beyond just opening bottle caps, cans, and sealed containers. It can also double as an anti-scalding pad and heat insulation pad, making it a versatile addition to your daily life.
Great for weak hands: Our jar opener grippers are a must-have for anyone who struggles with opening jars, including kids, women, and seniors. These grippers are designed to provide excellent leverage and are especially helpful for those with weaker hands.
Anti-slip grip: Our jar opener gripper pad is made of high-quality, durable silicone that boasts a soft texture and outstanding anti-slip properties. You can rely on this pad to provide a secure grip on even the most stubborn jars.
Easy to clean: Our round jar openers are not only practical but also easy to clean. The smooth surface of the gripper has no grooves or hard-to-reach areas, making it effortless to remove any grease, oil, or stains that may accumulate over time.

I also like that it sticks to the side of my fridge so I always know where it is.These grippers work well. They are great for taking off near impossible lids. reviews_1s: These discs have a smooth slick surface and are not effective in opening jars. The smooth surface just slips around the jar lid. Disappointed.Surface is too slippery to get a good grip.It did not help open anything! It is a waste of money!Very low quality, smelly
